title: angostura larensis
intro: Angostura larensis, also known as the Angostura tree or Guianese angostura, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Its bark, leaves, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Angostura larensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy in many cultures. Angostura larensis is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used to make the popular bitters drink, Angostura bitters, which is used in cocktails and as a digestif.
